docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-13-2009 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-09-2009 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-17-2009 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ETTOUMI, ABDELMONTALIB RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALATUALI, DHARHAN $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,550.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
